data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of transferring bookings between locations, but the evidence provided does not include any specific instances or mechanisms for transferring bookings. While the use case mentions that appointments auto-transfer to the nearest location with capacity, there is no concrete evidence or API interactions that demonstrate this functionality in action. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the transfer of bookings, which is critical to confirm this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the mechanism for transferring bookings between locations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
